name: Dialla's Malefaction
explicitMods: Gems can be Socketed in this Item ignoring Socket Colour
Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience
Has no Attribute Requirements
flavourText: He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summon a Holy Relic that stays near you. When you hit an enemy with an attack, the Holy Relic triggers a spell with a short cooldown, that deals physical damage to enemies in an area around a nearby enemy.
explicitMods: Maximum 2 Summoned Holy Relics
76% more Minion Movement Speed
Minions have 20% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Minions cannot Taunt Enemies

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
